stemHtml: Which statement is correct regarding an aircraft equipped with TCAS II?

options.a: Displays 10 targets, rejects targets outside of 30 NM
options.b: Displays 30 targets, rejects targets outside of 10 NM
options.c: Displays 10 targets, only gives commands in the horizontal plane
options.d: Displays 30 targets, only gives commands in the vertical plane
